steps.t: The pond where Catrin wanted you to throw the lumber-axes is east of the lumber-camp. Catrin asked you to steal lumber-axes from the camp north-east o…
Catrin is in the lower village of Galtrev, in Pren Gwydh. Catrin will be pleased to hear that you have disrupted work at the lumber-camp.
Lumber-piles can be found in the upper village of Galtrev. Catrin in the lower village of Galtrev has a torch for you to carry to lumber-piles through…
Catrin is in the lower village of Galtrev. You have burned wood-piles throughout the upper village and should return now to Catrin.
